amendments.description: Augment R6 review template with new sec-7 'Subtle weakening checks' running three explicit sub-checks: (check-3a) type-class inference probe via 'set_option trace.Meta.synthInstance true in #check apparent_singularity_thm_i'; (check-3b) grep -rn 'h_exact' lean/ --include='*.lean' (expected: matches only in Thm66 axiom decl); (check-3c) grep for negated/contradicted invocations of axiom name (expected: zero matches). Each reports PASS / FAIL / N/A. Any FAIL triggers HALT_148_THEOREM_WEAKENED with the specific failed sub-check.

Insert new TASK 5(0) before TASK 5(a): 'Dry-run preview -- paste full BEFORE and AFTER axiom blocks side-by-side in handoff.md; require operator confirmation in chat before proceeding to TASK 5(a) lake build.'

Replace mitigation column text per Q7 rule. New text: 'iter-18 heartbeat (re-run 141C triage class with iter-18 log); iter-24 alarm (T1-Synth re-consultation); iter-30 ceiling (halt + escalate). Counter scope: WallisFamily.lean / M10 V0 build-graph build-repair iterations only. Slot 148 (Thm66 axiom-reshape) and similar non-build-repair fires advance a separate fire-internal counter and do NOT contribute to R2. Currently iter-13 active.'

Add new sub-section '141C schema amendments (deferred from slot 143R, routed via slot 149 Q5 (5b))' absorbing C-143-1, C-143-2, C-143-3 as outlook-as-governance entries. 141C bridge artefacts at SHA 2e36e0f remain immutable; downstream tools that ingest blockers.json/sorries.json should read POST_DISCHARGE_PLAN outlook alongside.
Add one-line clarification: 'Slot 148 fire-internal iteration counter is independent of POST_DISCHARGE_PLAN R2; ladder ceiling for this fire is internal-30 with expected 1-2 iteration completion.'

amendments.target: axiom_reshape_report.md (to be produced by slot 148 fire)
